TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Narowan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 814 buwan, 2,080 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 22% kyan ku 457 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 78% kyan ku 1,623 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Sakizaya 1%, Truku 1%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Narowan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Narowan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Narowan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Narowan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Narowan hya' ga Kalala. tay 'llaw na Narowan hya' ga Fanaw. tay 'zil na Narowan hya' ga Ukang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ngasal psatu tegami maki 1 ngasal psatu tegami. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ narowan ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku kariЕ‹ keЕ‹ atu Д§amiК¦~КЁД§o ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *,*** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *,*** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, amis~Й• **%, s~Й•akizaja *%, truku *%, tajan *%, ОІunun *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran, Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami ru pqniqan iju. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj К”zil na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkjaД§uК” na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax. taj mkjaД§uК” na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa kalala. taj К”llaw na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa *anaw. taj К”zil na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa ukaЕ‹. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami maki * Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj. tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
S.FORM: alang Narowan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 814 buwan, 2,080 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 22% kyan ku 457 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 78% kyan ku 1,623 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Sakizaya 1%, Truku 1%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Narowan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Narowan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Narowan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Narowan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Narowan hya' ga Kalala. tay 'llaw na Narowan hya' ga Fanaw. tay 'zil na Narowan hya' ga Ukang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ngasal psatu tegami maki 1 ngasal psatu tegami. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ narowan ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku kariЕ‹ keЕ‹ atu Д§amiК¦~КЁД§o ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *,*** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *,*** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, amis~Й• **%, s~Й•akizaja *%, truku *%, tajan *%, ОІunun *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran, Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami ru pqniqan iju. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj К”zil na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkjaД§uК” na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax. taj mkjaД§uК” na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa kalala. taj К”llaw na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa *anaw. taj К”zil na narowan Д§jaК” ЙЈa ukaЕ‹. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami maki * Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj. tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
